basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa) has officially announced the Faculty on Contract Basis Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. NITGOA/RECT/CONT/2026/51 at the official website. Candidates holding M.Tech (awarded) / Ph.D (submitted or awarded) in CSE or relevant discipline are eligible to apply online before 26 July 2026. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech (awarded)/Ph.D (submitted/awarded) in CSE or relevant discipline
qualification.details: Faculty on Contract Basis (Department of Computer Science and Engineering): M.Tech (awarded)/Ph.D(submitted/awarded) in CSE or relevant discipline. Experience: Eleven months (Purely on Temporary basis).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree
salary_details.details: Consolidated Pay: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree Consolidated Pay: Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Goa Faculty on Contract Basis recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to upload the advance copy of the application is 26th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Faculty position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech (awarded) or Ph.D (submitted/awarded) in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) or a relevant discipline to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Faculty on Contract Basis?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Faculty on Contract Basis position in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at NIT Goa.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contract position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is a consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month for candidates with a Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month for those with a Ph.D. Degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is online. Candidates need to fill out an application form and upload a scanned copy via a Google form link.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Faculty on Contract Basis position is scheduled for 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original supporting documents along with a set of self-attested photocopies of their documents to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract for the Faculty position?
faq.answer: The contract is for a period of eleven months, purely on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Goa located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Goa is located in Cuncolim, Goa, with the pincode 403703.
